engine.name: HiveVitality
engine.tagline: Fifteen minutes a day. Reps that grow with you.

home.lede: Fifteen minutes. Six rounds. Reps grow from three to twenty-one over ten weeks. No equipment. No gym. Free, forever.

onboarding.step1_body: A daily fifteen-minute mobility ritual. Tibetan Rites plus balance plus a deep squat plus a hinge plus bridges plus a plank plus sumo squats. Reps grow with you.
onboarding.step2_title: Here is what the ritual looks like
onboarding.step2_body: Six rounds. About fifteen minutes. The reps you do today are not the reps you do in week ten — they grow as you do.
onboarding.step3_title: You are someone who moves every day
onboarding.step3_body: Not a workout. Not a goal. A daily practice you keep with yourself. Tap the button below when you are ready.

ritual.complete_lede: Tap below to add a ten-second reflection, or close the page — your streak is already saved.

reflection.lede: How did the body feel today? One sentence. Skip if you don't feel like it.

checkin.lede: Your weekly check-in. Pick a number; the rest is optional.

identity.imprint: I am someone who moves every day.

milestones.30day: Thirty days. The ritual is yours now.
milestones.90day: Ninety days. The body knows the shape of the day.
milestones.1year: One year. You are someone who moves every day.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.db_unavailable: Cannot reach the database. Your streak will sync when the connection comes back.
errors.qb_unavailable: Could not reach Queen Bee. The session was logged locally and will sync next time.

disclaimer.footer: This is not medical advice. Always consult a qualified clinician before starting a new movement practice.
disclaimer.no_ads: No ads. No investors. No agenda.
disclaimer.free_forever: Free at the base tier, forever.
